creator: empty.japan
caption:
It might seem like all I do in Nagano is visit Onsens, but there’s a reason for it - I literally can’t shower at home in winter because it’s just too cold 😵 My shower unit is a bit old and doesn’t have any heating, unlike my previous Kyoto apartment, and Nagano winters hit hard. A quick morning rinse is fine, but washing my hair? I freeze halfway through 🥶🤣 So, onsen it is.

Also, this is one of the reasons why I’m not a fan of staying in Airbnbs in Japan during winter. In most houses, especially traditional ones, it’s freezing inside. They might have a heater in the living room and bedroom (which usually isn’t enough), but when it comes to taking a proper shower? Nope. Hotels definitely win that round.

📍Jizo Onsen, Ueda
